introSection:
Ravine Flyer 3 is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Waldameer & Water World in Erie, Pennsylvania, USA. It was built by US manufacturer E&F Miler Industries. It is named after the original Ravine Flyer roller coaster which operated at the park several decades prior. Despite being the third Ravine Flyer, it opened before Ravine Flyer II, as the latter would not open until 2008 due to legal issues. It was the first steel roller coaster at the park.

It is tall, and has  of track. The train cycles the track twice for a complete ride.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Pink track and metallic supports, with yellow trains. It operates over a large pond which once held a bumper boats attraction.

fullText:
Ravine Flyer 3 is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Waldameer & Water World in Erie, Pennsylvania, USA. It was built by US manufacturer E&F Miler Industries. It is named after the original Ravine Flyer roller coaster which operated at the park several decades prior. Despite being the third Ravine Flyer, it opened before Ravine Flyer II, as the latter would not open until 2008 due to legal issues. It was the first steel roller coaster at the park.

It is tall, and has  of track. The train cycles the track twice for a complete ride.



Pink track and metallic supports, with yellow trains. It operates over a large pond which once held a bumper boats attraction.
